productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Dota and Stripes Orange Flip Flops
description: Colour-happy orange and brown flip flops for girls from adidas with an eye-catching printed design on the insole. Wear them on the beach, by the pool, or any time you want something easy and comfortable to slip onto your feet. Upper Fabric thong straps and fabric toe separator both backed for comfort PU footbed with print with printed branding Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum grip shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
